evals.prompt: Create a settings form with fields for: full name, email address, and notification preferences (email, SMS, push notifications as toggle options). Add validation states for required fields. Import UI from @kdunin/component-library (lucide icons).
evals.expected_output: A React component using FieldGroup, Field, ToggleGroup, data-invalid/aria-invalid validation, gap-* spacing, semantic colors, imports from @kdunin/component-library.
expectations: Imports primitives from @kdunin/component-library (not @/components/ui paths)
Uses FieldGroup and Field components for form layout instead of raw div with space-y
Uses ToggleGroup for the 2–5 option notification mode (not looping Button with manual active state)
Uses data-invalid on Field and aria-invalid on the input control for validation states
Uses gap-* (e.g. gap-4, gap-6) instead of space-y-* or space-x-* for spacing
Uses semantic color tokens (e.g. bg-background, text-muted-foreground, text-destructive) instead of raw colors like bg-red-500
No manual dark: color overrides

evals.prompt: Create a dialog for editing a user profile: avatar at the top, inputs for name and bio, Save/Cancel with icons. Use @kdunin/component-library and lucide-react. Triggers must use Base UI composition (render prop), not Radix asChild.
evals.expected_output: Dialog with DialogTitle, Avatar+AvatarFallback, data-icon on buttons, no icon sizing classes, imports from @kdunin/component-library.
expectations: Imports from @kdunin/component-library
Includes DialogTitle for accessibility (visible or with sr-only class)
Avatar component includes AvatarFallback
Icons on buttons use the data-icon attribute (data-icon="inline-start" or data-icon="inline-end")
No sizing classes on icons inside components (no size-4, w-4, h-4, etc.)
Uses render (or documented Base API) for custom triggers where applicable, not asChild

evals.prompt: Create a dashboard with 4 stat cards in a grid. Each card: title, large number, percentage change badge, loading skeleton state. Use @kdunin/component-library and lucide icons.
evals.expected_output: Full Card composition, Skeleton for loading, Badge for changes, semantic colors, gap-* spacing, package imports.
expectations: Imports from @kdunin/component-library
Uses full Card composition with CardHeader, CardTitle, CardContent (not dumping everything into CardContent)
Uses Skeleton component for loading placeholders instead of custom animate-pulse divs
Uses Badge component for percentage change instead of custom styled spans
Uses semantic color tokens instead of raw color values like bg-green-500 or text-red-600
Uses gap-* instead of space-y-* or space-x-* for spacing
Uses size-* when width and height are equal instead of separate w-* h-*
